description: Ground-truth correlation model for coal seam dataset

ambiguity_scenarios.explanation: Floez_9 and Floez_10 are thin (0.8-1.2m) and frequently absent. When only one thin seam is present, it could be either. Also, Katharina splits into two thin layers resembling these seams.
Fluvial channels locally erode seams. Wells in washout zones lack certain seams, creating lateral discontinuity that the correlator must bridge.
Katharina and Prasident frequently split into 2 leaves separated by a thin stone band. A split seam looks like two separate thin seams on logs.
